title: Enter the app through the admin bypass login
description: An authorized user can use the development bypass login to reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Click the admin role bypass control
Verify the user is signed in

title: Submit a volunteer registration request
description: A public applicant can complete the registration form and receive confirmation that the request was received.

steps.description: Verify a confirmation that the registration request was received is visible

title: Complete public volunteer registration
description: A public applicant can submit the registration form and see a confirmation that the application was received.

steps.description: Fill in the registration form with valid applicant details
Verify a registration confirmation is visible

title: Assign a volunteer to an event role
description: An authenticated coordinator can open an event workspace, assign a volunteer to a role, and see the assignment in the roster.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the events list
Start assigning a volunteer to a role
Select a volunteer and a role
Verify the roster shows the new volunteer assignment

title: Open an event workspace from the events list
description: An authenticated user can open an event from the list and see the event workspace with roster and event details.

steps.description: Click the admin role bypass control
Open an event workspace from the list
Verify the event workspace is displayed
Verify the event roster and event details are visible

title: Build a service run sheet
description: A coordinator can reorder service items, add transition notes, and see the updated run sheet flow.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the events list
Open the run sheet builder for an event
Add transition notes to the run sheet
Verify the updated run sheet order is displayed

title: Approve a pending volunteer
description: This test verifies that an admin can review a pending volunteer registration and approve it so the status updates in the approval queue.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the approve control for a pending volunteer
Verify the volunteer status is updated to approved

title: Browse and filter the events list
description: An authenticated user can view upcoming events and narrow the list by status and time.

steps.description: Click the admin role bypass control
Verify the filtered event list is displayed
Verify event entries remain visible after filtering

title: Add a volunteer unavailability block
description: This test verifies that an authenticated volunteer can add an unavailability date range with a reason and see the blocked dates appear on the calendar.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add an unavailability date range with a reason
Verify the blocked dates are displayed on the calendar

title: Block out availability dates
description: A volunteer can add an unavailable date range and see it reflected in the availability calendar.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new availability block is displayed

title: Search the volunteer directory
description: An admin can search the volunteer directory and see matching volunteer results.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the volunteer directory
Search for a volunteer by name

title: Create a new song in the library
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can add a new song with complete details and see it appear in the song library.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a new song with title, artist, key, and BPM
Verify the new song appears in the song library

title: Accept a pending shift swap
description: This test verifies that a volunteer can accept a pending swap request and see it move to the accepted state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the swap request is shown in the accepted state

title: Review a pending volunteer application
description: An admin can open the volunteer approval queue and see pending applications available for review.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the volunteer approval queue
Verify pending volunteer applications are displayed

title: Decline a pending shift swap
description: This test verifies that a volunteer can decline a pending swap request and see it move to the declined state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the swap request is shown in the declined state

title: Search and edit an existing song
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can search for a song by title, open it, edit its details, and save the changes.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for a song by title
Verify the updated song details are displayed

title: Open a volunteer profile
description: An admin can open an individual volunteer profile and view the volunteer's skills and journey information.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the volunteer directory
Verify the volunteer profile displays skills and journey information

title: Update personal profile details
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can edit their name and phone number and see the updated profile information saved.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the name field with a new display name
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Verify the updated profile information is displayed

title: Respond to a shift swap request
description: A volunteer can open a swap request and accept or decline it from the swaps page.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the swap request shows the updated response

title: Reject a pending volunteer
description: This test verifies that an admin can reject a pending volunteer registration and see the status update in the approval queue.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the reject control for a pending volunteer
Verify the volunteer status is updated to rejected

title: Remove a volunteer unavailability block
description: This test verifies that an authenticated volunteer can remove an existing unavailability block and see the dates become available again.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dates are available again

title: Review readiness and coverage analytics
description: An admin can open analytics and view ministry readiness and coverage reporting.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify readiness and coverage analytics are displayed

title: View the analytics dashboard overview
description: An authenticated user can open the analytics dashboard and see the overall ministry statistics and report sections.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify event coverage reporting is displayed

title: Change notification preferences
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can update notification preferences and save the new settings.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated notification preferences are displayed

title: Review the full analytics dashboard sections
description: An authenticated user can access the analytics dashboard and see volunteer, coverage, and department reporting sections together.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify department breakdown reporting is displayed

title: Open analytics from the main dashboard
description: An authenticated user can reach the analytics dashboard from the main dashboard and view the ministry reporting overview.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to view the main dashboard
Click the link to view analytics
Verify the analytics dashboard is displayed

title: Review an empty events list state
description: An authenticated user viewing events with no matching filters sees a clear empty state instead of results.

steps.description: Click the admin role bypass control
Apply filters that return no matching events
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no event entries are shown

title: Toggle the app theme
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can change the theme preference and see the theme update in the interface.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the theme preference change is reflected in the interface

title: View analytics after accessing the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open analytics from the dashboard and confirm ministry reporting content is available.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify volunteer readiness statistics are displayed

title: Persist settings changes after multiple preference updates
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can update more than one app preference in the settings page and see the saved configuration reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated settings are displayed

title: Manage app preferences
description: An authenticated user can update theme and notification preferences and see the settings saved in the app UI.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated settings are displayed

title: See analytics reporting sections after login
description: An authenticated user can log in and see the analytics dashboard sections used for ministry reporting.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify department breakdown reporting is displayed

title: Reject an invalid profile update
description: This test verifies that invalid profile input is blocked and the existing profile information is preserved.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a profile validation error is visible
Verify the current profile information remains displayed

title: Prevent duplicate volunteer registration
description: A public applicant who submits the form with the same details twice sees a duplicate registration validation and no second request is created.

steps.description: Submit the registration form again with the same details
Verify a duplicate registration validation is visible
Verify only one registration confirmation is visible

title: Handle an empty volunteer search
description: An admin can search for a volunteer name with no matches and see an empty state instead of results.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the volunteer directory
Search for a name that has no matches
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Keep a swap request in its current state after already handled actions
description: This test verifies that handled swap requests do not allow duplicate acceptance or decline actions and remain in their completed state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to accept the same handled swap request again
Verify the swap request remains in the accepted state
